# CBAMValid — LLM & AI Agent Sitemap

> CBAMValid is an independent software service that assists non-EU exporters and EU importers in preparing verification-ready Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) dossiers. The platform automatically verifies data compliance, links primary document evidence, and generates locked exporter declarations.

## Core Software & Tools
- [CBAM Exporter Software](https://cbamvalid.com/product/): Configure manufacturing installations, map system boundaries, track source streams, and link evidence files.
- [Pricing Packages](https://cbamvalid.com/pricing/): Purchase credits to unlock the 23-component verification readiness package and generate sealed dossier releases.
- [CBAM Certificate Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/verify/): Cryptographically verify the integrity, release status, and ledger logs of generated dossiers.
- [CBAM CN-Code Scope Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code/): Query product CN codes to determine if they fall within the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism scope.

## Methodologies & Guides
- [CBAM Calculation Methodology](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology/): Formulas and data structures for calculating direct and indirect embedded emissions under EU regulations.
- [CBAM Workflow Guide](https://cbamvalid.com/how-it-works/): Detailed step-by-step walk-through of the dossier preparation process from initial setup to sealing.
- [Sample Compliance Dossier](https://cbamvalid.com/sample-dossier/): Interactive viewer showcasing a complete fictional operator preparation dossier.

## About & Legal Information
- [About CBAMValid](https://cbamvalid.com/about/): Background, academic oversight, advisory board members, and service mission.
- [Contact Support](https://cbamvalid.com/contact/): Submit billing, API, or general support tickets to info@cbamvalid.com.
- [Terms of Service](https://cbamvalid.com/terms/): Legal terms, credit entitlement contract, and platform usage limits.
- [Privacy Notice](https://cbamvalid.com/privacy/): Security policy, data isolation, and encryption protocols for evidence storage.
- [Refund Policy](https://cbamvalid.com/refund-policy/): Transaction refund rules and credit ledger terms.
- [Cookie Policy](https://cbamvalid.com/cookie-policy/): Usage of authentication session cookies and site preferences.
- [Legal Notice](https://cbamvalid.com/legal-notice/): Corporate operator details and tax IDs.

## AI & Developer Resources
- [Full LLM Knowledge base](https://cbamvalid.com/llms-full.txt): Absolute full text, formulas, and schema contracts of the platform for AI engines.
- [Sitemap.xml](https://cbamvalid.com/sitemap.xml): Dynamic XML index containing lastmod timestamps and crawl frequencies.
